findings.finding: HIGH-1 fix for shell wrapper is not committed. The spec required --iteration >= 1 enforcement in both Python and shell. The Python fix is in commit 44c0a78. The shell fix (^[0-9]+$ -> ^[1-9][0-9]*$) exists only as an uncommitted working-tree change. git show 44c0a78:skills/feature-development/ai_review_openai.sh still contains the Phase 0 regex. The test test_iteration_zero_exits_64 passes because it calls the Python script directly, not the shell wrapper — the shell-layer gap is untested in committed history.
findings.suggested_fix: Commit the working-tree change to ai_review_openai.sh (one-line diff already present). Add a companion test that invokes the shell wrapper via subprocess with --iteration 0 and asserts exit code 64.
